title: crotalaria crebra
intro: Crotalaria crebra, also known as stickplant, is a shrubby plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria crebra include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Crotalaria crebra is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a powder or extract in traditional medicine.
